steps.title: Identify the slope of the linear function
steps.content:
The function $$F(x)=\frac{9}{5}(x-273.15)+32$$ can be rewritten as $$F(x)=\frac{9}{5}x + \left(32-\frac{9}{5}\cdot273.15\right)$$ , showing it is linear with slope $$m=\frac{9}{5}$$ .
For a linear function, a change in the input produces a change in the output equal to the slope times the input change: $$\Delta F = m \cdot \Delta x$$.

steps.title: Compute the increase in Fahrenheit
steps.content:
Here $$\Delta x = 2.10$$ kelvins, so $$\Delta F = \frac{9}{5} \times 2.10 = \frac{9 \times 2.10}{5} = \frac{18.9}{5} = 3.78$$ degrees Fahrenheit.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
